articles.author: The Associated Press
articles.title: Spearfisher killed in Australia’s third fatal shark attack in 4 weeks - ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
articles.description: A spearfisher has been killed in Australia’s third fatal shark attack in four weeks, according to police
articles.content:
MELBOURNE, Australia -- A spearfisher was killed on Saturday in Australias third fatal shark attack in four weeks, police said.
The 35-year-old man was spearfishing with family off Michaelmas Island… [+989 chars]
